name: Shi

skills.name: Maiden's Trick
skills.description: The farther away the enemy is, the more damage skills deal.

skills.name: Silk Imprint
skills.description: Throws her artifact, damaging enemies and pulling them toward it. Can be used again to pull the enemy in the target direction.

skills.name: Silky Beauty
skills.description: Releases an energy orb that continuously deals damage to enemies within range for a short time, and then explodes to deal additional damage. Enemies are slowed the first time the orb hits them.

skills.name: Sole Focus
skills.description: Resets Skill 2's cooldown and enhances herself. While enhanced, gains Movement Speed and reduces Skill 2's cooldown by half. Skill 1 can pull the enemy twice.

tips: Shi (Mage): Tier B on international ranked — 50.7% WR.
Build core: Knowledge Gem, Boots of Deftness, Crimson Shadow - Radiance.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 50.7%, pick 0.58%, ban 0.26%, popularity tier B.
Counters Li Bai, Wukong, Ukyo Tachibana · Weak into Athena.

faqs.question: Is Shi good in current season?
faqs.answer: Shi is Tier B Mage with 50.7% win rate, 0.58% pick rate, and 0.26% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Shi build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Knowledge Gem, Boots of Deftness, Crimson Shadow - Radiance, Grand Staff, Frozen Breath, Ominous Premonition. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Shi?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Shi: Athena. Shi is strong into Li Bai, Wukong, Ukyo Tachibana.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Li Bai, Wukong, Ukyo Tachibana. Countered by: Athena.
